pages.text: The Mass Upgrade Configurator is a powerful tool that allows you to batch install or remove upgrades on multiple Mekanism machines at once.

pages.title: Selecting Upgrade
pages.text: Before using the tool, you need to select an upgrade module from your inventory.$(br)$(br)The tool will automatically detect upgrade modules in your inventory and display the current upgrade in the item tooltip.

pages.title: Modes
pages.text: The configurator has two modes:$(br)$(li)Install Mode: Installs upgrades on machines$(li)Remove Mode: Removes upgrades from machines$(br)$(br)Right-click in air to switch between modes.

pages.title: Radius Mode
pages.text: In Radius Mode:$(br)$(li)Sneak + Right-click machine: Apply operation to all adjacent machines$(li)Right-click air: Switch mode$(li)Sneak + Right-click air: Toggle selection mode

pages.title: Selection Mode
pages.text: In Selection Mode:$(br)$(li)Sneak + Right-click: Set first/second corner of selection$(li)Right-click: Execute batch operation on all machines in selection$(br)$(br)Select two corners to define a cubic area.
